name: VCA/Multiplier
description: This algorithm is a voltage multiplier, which can be used as a VCA. The CV on the common channel is used to multiply the voltages on the other channels.

parameters.name: Channels
parameters.description: The number of bus channels to process.

parameters.name: Clamp to 0V
parameters.description: Whether to clamp the common input to 0V (typical VCA usage) or not (four quadrant multiplier usage).

parameters.name: Divider
parameters.description: Sets the scaling of the input CV that corresponds to unity gain.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

output_ports.name: Output
output_ports.description: The output bus. If set to None, the input bus is used as output, and the mode is always Replace.
